markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content generation workflows and improvement opportunities for GrowthX's AI-powered content platform.](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current pain points include research quality, link accuracy, and limited feedback capabilities in the Aerops platform](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Nemanja has developed workarounds using Perplexity and Claude to improve efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [GrowthX is working on standardizing best practices and adding new features like persona generation and content scoring](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [More systematic thinking and editorial mindset needed from content managers to optimize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Generation Challenges

  - [Poor assignment briefs (mostly resolved)](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Research phase issues:](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [Over-linking (40+ links in 2000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Dead links and inaccurate citations](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Hallucinated case studies and statistics](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Limited granularity in feedback and polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Difficulty reverting mistakes or making specific edits](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Nemanja's Workaround Process

  - [Uses Perplexity for research generation with specific structure](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Employs Claude for outlining, drafting, and polishing](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
  - [Implements Paul Graham's style guide for Exec's preferred tone](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Process takes 30-90 minutes per blog, depending on complexity](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [Allows for more granular control and efficiency than Aerops](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)

### GrowthX Platform Improvements

  - [Rebuilding client grids according to best practices](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Expanding polishing instructions to include:](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
      - [Voice and tone guidance](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
      - [Content structure specifications](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
      - [Brand messaging and compliance](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Adding user context and AI context fields for better targeting](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Exploring cascading feedback capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)
  - [Developing content scoring and link validation features](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Systematic Thinking and Editorial Mindset

  - [Need for content managers to think more systematically about workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Importance of proactive intervention and clear articulation of issues](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Shift towards hiring more editorial-minded content managers](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Encouraging sharing of learnings and best practices across pods](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nemanja to send detailed documentation of his process to Matthew](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Share recording and docs with Nana for team review](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=3048.0)
  - [Continue refining polishing instructions and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Explore implementation of persona generator and content scoring features](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Develop more standardized, sharable workflows across pods](https://fathom.video/share/yX9_wuc8K5D7b7-zdR_X8wea9zLa6wgL?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)
